# GhostAI 

GhostAI is an AI-powered career tool that helps job seekers improve CVs, tailor applications to specific job descriptions, and prepare stronger interview answers. 

## Purpose 

GhostAI helps students, graduates, professionals, and career switchers improve their chances of getting interviews by giving practical, role-specific CV feedback and interview coaching. 

## Key Pages 

- Homepage: https://www.ghostaicorp.com 
- Pricing: https://www.ghostaicorp.com/pricing 
- Sign up: https://www.ghostaicorp.com/signup 
- Privacy Policy: https://www.ghostaicorp.com/privacy 
- Terms of Service: https://www.ghostaicorp.com/terms 

## Main Features 

- AI CV feedback 
- Job description matching 
- ATS-style scoring 
- CV bullet point improvement 
- Interview answer coaching 
- Career guidance 

## Contact 

Email: ghostaicorp@gmail.com
